title: ElytraToggle
description: A bukkit plugin that toggles elytra midflight using jump key, just like in bedrock. Works on Geyser.
body:
A simple bukkit plugin that allows players to toggle elytra midflight, just like in bedrock. Simply use the jump key and it will toggle the gliding.

This is not a mod. This is made for bukkit based servers.

By default all players can toggle glide, but you can negate it with permission:
```
elytratoggle.use
```

This plugin requires [PacketEvents](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents) to work.

This is only tested in 1.21.8+, it may work in lower versions but I can't guarantee.
